description: The AWS::ECR::RegistryScanningConfiguration controls the scanning configuration for an Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon Private ECR). For more information, see https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECR/latest/userguide/image-scanning.html

ScanningRules.description: The scanning rules associated with the registry. A registry scanning configuration may contain a maximum of 2 rules.
ScanningRules.markdownDescription:
The scanning rules associated with the registry. A registry scanning configuration may contain a maximum of 2 rules.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

RepositoryFilters.description: The repository filters associated with the scanning configuration for a private registry.
RepositoryFilters.markdownDescription:
The repository filters associated with the scanning configuration for a private registry.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ScanningRule.description: A rule representing the details of a scanning configuration.
ScanningRule.markdownDescription:
A rule representing the details of a scanning configuration.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

RepositoryFilter.description: The details of a scanning repository filter.
RepositoryFilter.markdownDescription:
The details of a scanning repository filter.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Filter.description: The filter to use when scanning.
Filter.markdownDescription:
The filter to use when scanning.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9*](?:[._\-/a-z0-9*]?[a-z0-9*]+)*$  
Update requires: No interruption

FilterType.description: The type associated with the filter.
FilterType.markdownDescription:
The type associated with the filter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: WILDCARD  
Update requires: No interruption

ScanFrequency.description: The frequency that scans are performed.
ScanFrequency.markdownDescription:
The frequency that scans are performed.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SCAN_ON_PUSH | CONTINUOUS_SCAN  
Update requires: No interruption

ScanType.description: The type of scanning configured for the registry.
ScanType.markdownDescription:
The type of scanning configured for the registry.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: BASIC | ENHANCED  
Update requires: No interruption

RegistryId.markdownDescription:
The registry id.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
